questions: merger ar acquisition er difference ki?
answers: Mergers and acquisitions (M&A) refer to the consolidation of companies. A merger combines two companies into one, while an acquisition is when one company buys another.
Merger e dui company ek hoye jay notun company banay, ar acquisition e ek company arek company ke buy kore ney. Duita e business growth er strategy.
Companies merge to increase market share, reduce competition, achieve economies of scale, access new technologies, or enter new markets more quickly.
The M&A process involves target identification, due diligence, valuation, negotiation, regulatory approval, and finally integration of the two companies' operations and cultures.
